name: Royalty Management Holding Corp
summary: PART I . All references to we, us, our, RMHCRoyalty,or the Company in this Annual Report on Form 10-K mean Royalty Management Holding Corporation. We were a blank check company formed under the laws of the State of Delaware on January 20, 2021 for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or other similar business combination with one or more target businesses (a Business Combination).
